overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long LULU Daily ETF (LULG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Lululemon Athletica, Inc. (NASDAQ: LULU) stock, less fees, and expenses LULG was launched on Nov 5, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
